user.title: Add first entity
user.description: Create the first redundant entity. More can be added later via the integration options.

data_description.primary_entity: Used when available (e.g. LocalTuya). If it becomes unavailable, the fallback takes over.
data_description.fallback_entity: Used when the primary is unavailable (e.g. Tuya cloud).

error.same_entity: Primary and fallback entities must be different.

data_description.entity_type: The type of the virtual entity that will be created (independent of the source entities).
data_description.fallback_entity: Used when the primary is unavailable (e.g. Tuya cloud).

remove_entity.title: Remove entity
remove_entity.description: The entity will be removed from Home Assistant.

import_json.title: Import from JSON
import_json.description:
Paste a JSON array. Each item must have: `name`, `entity_type` (`switch` or `light`), `primary_entity`, `fallback_entity`.

Example:
```json
[
  {
    "name": "Banheiro",
    "entity_type": "switch",
    "primary_entity": "switch.banheiro_local",
    "fallback_entity": "switch.banheiro_cloud"
  }
]
```

error.same_entity: Primary and fallback entities must be different.
error.invalid_json: Invalid JSON. Check the format and try again.
